CustomField.description: When enabled, Allocation records can be created at the Payment level in addition to the Opportunity level. NPPatch can automatically create Payment Allocations based on the parent Opportunity's Allocation percentages, or users can manually create them. Primarily used with Accounting Subledger integrations. Disabled by default.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Allow Allocations at the Payment level. NPPatch auto-creates Payment Allocations based on Opportunity Allocations. Primarily for Accounting Subledger use.
CustomField.label: Payment Allocations Enabled
